This individual-sized dessert features a cylindrical base with a pale, muted green exterior that has a fine, matte-like texture and subtle horizontal ridging. On top sits a prominent, bright white decorative element shaped like a five-petaled blossom with smooth, rounded edges and a soft, pillowy appearance. At the very center of the white blossom is a small, glossy, translucent yellow dollop. A thin rectangular brown topper with white text is inserted vertically into the back of the white decorative element.
